title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・君臨する悪役

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek shuts Oguri Cap out with a tenacious
run, seizing the victory for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek has won race after race intent on
earning me the title of "best trainer in the world."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to make this dream a reality, the next
race she chooses to run in is... the Arima Kinen!
